程序包 edu.bupt.ta.service

类 LogService

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.service.LogService
public class LogService extends Object
Manages the system audit log stored in data/system_logs.csv. Provides methods to append log entries and query them by operator, type, date range, keyword, and pagination. All public methods are synchronized.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    LogService()
    Creates the LogService and ensures the log file exists with a header row.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • LogService

      public LogService()
      Creates the LogService and ensures the log file exists with a header row. Called automatically when the servlet is initialised.

  • 方法详细资料

    • log

      public void log(String operatorId, String operatorName, String operationType, String targetType, String targetId, String details, String ipAddress)
      Appends a new audit log entry to the system log file. Assigns the next sequential log ID and sets the creation timestamp to now.
      参数:
      operatorId - userId of the actor performing the action
      operatorName - display name of the actor
      operationType - action type, e.g. LOGIN, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, APPROVE, REJECT
      targetType - entity type acted upon, e.g. User, Job, Application
      targetId - ID of the entity acted upon
      details - human-readable description of the operation
      ipAddress - client IP address

    • getAllLogs

      public List<SystemLog> getAllLogs()
      返回:
      all log entries sorted newest-first

    • getLogsByOperator

      public List<SystemLog> getLogsByOperator(String operatorId)
      参数:
      operatorId - the operator ID to filter by
      返回:
      all log entries for this operator, sorted newest-first

    • getLogsByType

      public List<SystemLog> getLogsByType(String operationType)
      参数:
      operationType - the operation type to filter by
      返回:
      all log entries with this type, sorted newest-first

    • getLogsByDateRange

      public List<SystemLog> getLogsByDateRange(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end)
      参数:
      start - the start of the date range (inclusive)
      end - the end of the date range (inclusive)
      返回:
      all log entries in the range, sorted newest-first

    • searchLogs

      public List<SystemLog> searchLogs(String keyword)
      参数:
      keyword - the keyword to search for (case-insensitive)
      返回:
      matching log entries, sorted newest-first

    • getLogsPaginated

      public List<SystemLog> getLogsPaginated(int page, int pageSize)
      Returns a single page of log entries, sorted newest first.
      参数:
      page - 1-based page number
      pageSize - number of entries per page
      返回:
      a list of at most pageSize entries, or an empty list if page is out of range

    • getTotalPages

      public int getTotalPages(int pageSize)
      Calculates the total number of pages for a given page size.
      参数:
      pageSize - entries per page
      返回:
      total page count (minimum 0)
